title: diplazium barisanicum
intro: Diplazium barisanicum, also known as the Borneo shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Borneo and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Diplazium barisanicum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which are commonly used in traditional medicine, and it is also used in modern herbal preparations to support overall well-being.
